title: NoFireOverlay
description: A customizable fire or lava overlay mod that keeps burning visible without blocking your view
body:
[![JOIN OUR DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)

Сlient-side utility mod that replaces Minecraft's default fire overlay with a cleaner and much less obstructive version. You still get a clear visual warning that you are burning, but it no longer covers large parts of the screen or gets in the way of combat, movement, or UI visibility.

![Mod overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e3b2b5125b2bd6f48cddb296c27128f971b42ec_0.webp)

**Client-side only** (no server installation required). **Fully compatible with singleplayer**.

**What it does:**
- Replaces the vanilla on-fire overlay with a compact low-profile warning.
- Keeps the effect visible enough to clearly show that the player is burning.
- Greatly reduces interference with the HUD, hotbar, crosshair, and general visibility.
- Lets you adjust the overlay directly from the in-game mod config screen.

**Configuration:**
You can customize the overlay through the mod configuration screen in the mod list menu.

**Available settings:**
- Enable or disable the reduced fire overlay.
- Opacity.
- Height.
- Width.
- Side offset.
- Reset to default values.

**Details:**
- Client-side only.
- All settings are stored locally in your game config folder.
- Fully translated into 10 languages: English, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Brazilian Portuguese, Korean, and Italian.

**Please report any bugs, errors, or feature suggestions on Discord:** https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE
